title: Alert
description: Inline message to inform users about a status (info/success/warning/danger). Not transient; used inside page flow.

props.name: dismissible
props.description: Whether the alert can be dismissed.

keyboard: If dismissible, dismiss button is reachable via Tab and operable with Enter/Space.
aria: Use role="alert" for critical/danger messages that must be announced immediately.
Use role="status" for non-urgent informational messages.

must: Alert must be understandable without relying on color alone (icon + text).
Actions (if present) must be clear and limited.
must_not: Do not use alerts as a replacement for form field errors (use inline-error/form-field).

token_usage.notes: Use surface radius for alert container.
